title: Large Sample Comparison Hypothesis Testing Workflow
description: A flowchart outlining the step-by-step process for statistically comparing two large independent samples, including hypothesis formulation, test selection, and result interpretation.
elements: Determine P-value & Compare to Significance Level (α)
Make Decision: Reject H₀ or Fail to Reject H₀
relationships: Sequential flow from Start to Conclusion, with a decision point at the P-value comparison that leads to the final conclusion.
